name: scafkit-cli
description: Interactive CLI for generating starter projects.

scripts.check: node --check bin/scafkit-cli.js && node --check src/generators/phpGenerator.js && node --check src/generators/pernGenerator.js && node --check src/generators/reactGenerator.js && node --check src/utils/fileSystem.js
scripts.security:strict: npm run security:audit && npm run security:socket
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run security:audit

author: Railey-Sawada
